items.title: Google's YouTube settles social media addiction case with teen

items.title: Google Home will soon get better at recognizing you
items.summary: A new update for Google Home could make it less likely your smart home cameras mistake you for someone else, just because you're facing away from the camera. Starting June 23rd,...
